scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w foodfornow-backend" "wait-on http://localhost:3001 -t 30000 && npm run dev -w foodfornow-frontend"
scripts.dev:host: concurrently "npm run dev -w foodfornow-backend" "npm run dev:host -w foodfornow-frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test -w foodfornow-backend && npm run test -w foodfornow-frontend
